acceptance_targets: [ch03_f01] PASS if the revised passage explicitly accounts for all three inherited numbers (or shows an on-page deletion with motive) before the first call; FAIL if the contact count remains two with no causal explanation.
[ch03_f02] PASS if the revised ending contains an on-page mechanical outcome tied to the dawn repair attempt; FAIL if the chapter still ends before any observable car-status change.

[ch03_f03] PASS if readers can point to the exact sent text containing the dollar amount and harm context, plus an immediate post-send consequence in the next sentence; FAIL if the send remains inferential or euphemized.

[ch03_f04] PASS if Eli gives one explicit self-indicting statement after the confession and Cora answers that statement directly before offering the room; FAIL if the scene pivots to logistics without that accountability beat.

[ch03_f05] PASS if at least one line each from Vera, Lena, and Cora has distinct lexical/rhythmic markers and remains attributable without dialogue tags; FAIL if the lines still read like the same aphoristic voice in rotation.
[ch03_f06] PASS if the revised section keeps chronology clear while limiting explicit 'By/At/Around + time' openers to two or fewer; FAIL if temporal stamp openings still dominate paragraph starts.
[ch03_f07] PASS if the revised line uses complete sentence syntax (explicit subject and predicate) while keeping the same pressure; FAIL if telegraphic fragmentary narration remains.

[ch03_f08] PASS if the revised line communicates the same pressure using varied concrete language and does not repeat a single abstract noun in three successive short sentences; FAIL if the triadic keyword loop remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage explicitly accounts for all three inherited numbers (or shows an on-page deletion with motive) before the first call; FAIL if the contact count remains two with no causal explanation.
findings.problem: Immediate-state continuity breaks: the chapter says Eli's prepaid phone has only two stored contacts, but inherited boundary canon from chapter_02 establishes that he copied three numbers (Nora, Theo, HR). Because who can reach him is plot-critical to traceability and consequence, this unexplained count drop reads as a canonical mismatch.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the phone setup at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:17 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:18 so the text either preserves all three copied numbers or explicitly stages which number Eli deleted and why before he calls roadside service.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised ending contains an on-page mechanical outcome tied to the dawn repair attempt; FAIL if the chapter still ends before any observable car-status change.
findings.problem: The chapter's objective/state delta is to get the car running, but the scene cuts before any repair outcome is rendered. Deferring the ignition/result beat weakens chapter-level payoff after substantial setup and labor cost.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add a concrete repair-result beat in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:315 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:317 (engine starts, stalls, leaks, or fails) tied to Darlene's promised dawn work from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:183.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if readers can point to the exact sent text containing the dollar amount and harm context, plus an immediate post-send consequence in the next sentence; FAIL if the send remains inferential or euphemized.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the confession climax: the scene spends beats on euphemistic draft texts, then the final send line is phrased ambiguously enough to blur what was actually sent. That ambiguity functions as a moral safety valve where the chapter needs explicit consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the send sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:303 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:315 so the final transmitted message is shown verbatim (including $14,000 and family impact) and followed immediately by one concrete consequence beat (device response, incoming call, or embodied reaction).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if Eli gives one explicit self-indicting statement after the confession and Cora answers that statement directly before offering the room; FAIL if the scene pivots to logistics without that accountability beat.
findings.problem: Timidity after the hardest admission: once Eli names the $14,000 transfer, the exchange quickly retreats into defensive sidestepping and service-logistics (pie/room terms) instead of sustaining the emotional pressure his confession creates.
findings.rewrite_direction: Strengthen the confrontation between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:279 by adding one forced, concrete answer from Eli about motive or anticipated harm before the scene moves to lodging logistics.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least one line each from Vera, Lena, and Cora has distinct lexical/rhythmic markers and remains attributable without dialogue tags; FAIL if the lines still read like the same aphoristic voice in rotation.
findings.problem: Supporting voices drift toward interchangeable aphoristic punch-lines (for example: 'Usually is fake,' 'Narrow saves time,' 'choice with luggage,' 'folded map'). The shared cadence blurs idiolect separation and weakens dialogue realism.
findings.rewrite_direction: Retune dialogue in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:171, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:247 so Vera stays procedural/command-driven, Lena stays younger and colloquial, and Cora stays service-floor concrete rather than proverb-heavy.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section keeps chronology clear while limiting explicit 'By/At/Around + time' openers to two or fewer; FAIL if temporal stamp openings still dominate paragraph starts.
findings.problem: Recurring clock-stamp construction ('By/At/Around + time') appears well over twice and pushes the chapter into logbook cadence, flattening sentence-level variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise time transitions in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:147, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:161, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:197, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:309 so chronology is carried by action/sensory shifts; retain no more than two explicit clock-stamp openings across this run.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line uses complete sentence syntax (explicit subject and predicate) while keeping the same pressure; FAIL if telegraphic fragmentary narration remains.
findings.problem: Elliptical clipping appears in narration ('Not a cut yet.'), violating the constitution's ban on telegraphic subject-dropping in narrative prose.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:129 into grammatically complete narration that preserves threat without clipped fragments.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line communicates the same pressure using varied concrete language and does not repeat a single abstract noun in three successive short sentences; FAIL if the triadic keyword loop remains.
findings.problem: Mechanical lexical repetition flattens the admonition beat: 'Grocery arithmetic. Tuition arithmetic. Sleep arithmetic.' repeats the same abstract noun three times, creating token-loop texture instead of character-specific speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Cora's warning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:259 with concrete diner-floor and household imagery (for example bills, shifts, missed sleep) while avoiding repeated reuse of the same abstract keyword.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
